note: Counts reflect engineers between engagements. The agent MUST NOT promise capacity beyond these counts.

python_backend.notes: FastAPI, Django, Postgres heavy. Two with LLM-app experience.

python_data.notes: Airflow, dbt, Snowflake, Databricks. One with Ray.

ml_platform.notes: MLflow, Weights & Biases, model-serving. Constrained — gate Segment 4 pitches on this.

agentic_systems.notes: Single engineer; treat as proof-of-concept capacity only.

escalation_rule: If the prospect asks for staffing beyond the counts above OR a start date < 14 days, the agent must hand off to a human delivery lead rather than committing.
